commands.review_summary:
Adds a pinned plugin session-extension registry surface, routes session patch/projection lookups through it, and pins/releases it during gateway and standalone plugin runtime lifecycles with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +82, Tests +352. Total +434 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, though I did not execute a local repro in this read-only review. Current main routes sessions.pluginPatch to patchPluginSessionExtension, which reads the mutable active registry, and the linked issue gives a concrete WebSocket repro for the churn failure.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair job is appropriate because the remaining blocker is contributor-owned latest-head real behavior proof plus normal maintainer/check review, not a narrow code defect.
